name: focused-moment
description: Local-first focus desktop app with pomodoro, todos, analytics, and creative focus mechanics.

scripts.tauri:dev: set "PATH=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin;%PATH%" && set "CARGO=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin\cargo.exe" && set "CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1" && set "CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0" && tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: set "PATH=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin;%PATH%" && set "CARGO=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin\cargo.exe" && set "CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1" && set "CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0" && tauri build
scripts.tauri:build:exe: set "PATH=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin;%PATH%" && set "CARGO=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin\cargo.exe" && set "CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1" && set "CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0" && cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --release
